titleStmt.title: SII 6.1143: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1143. (A.R. No. 362 of 1899). ON THE FIFTY-SIXTH PILLAR OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
krīḍākrōḍaḥ sa vō dēvaḥ kalyāṇamabhiva¨rṣatu . yaddaṁ
ṣṭrācaṁdrarēkhāyāṁ lakṣmalakṣmīṁ dadhau kṣamā . 1 rājā
nō jayaśālinassamabhavanmīnānvaThe letternva is written below the line.yālaṁkṛtāsta
trāsīdarivīrava¨rggavijayā śrīmān jayaṁttō
nṛpaḥ . tasmāda[¨r*]jjunabhūpatiḥ parahitaprārabdhamū
¨rtti¨rgguṇagrāmōtpattigṛhaṁ sapatnabhujagaśrēṇī
vihaṁggēśvaraḥ . 2 svasti śrīśakavatsarē vasumatī
ratnēṁddubhūsammitē sōyaṁ śrīnṛharērakhaṁḍa
vilasaddīpāya bhūpālakaḥ . Icchan svīyaku
lābhivṛddhimacalāṁ kī¨rttiṁ pratāpaṁ gavāṁ prādā
dujvaladīpadaṁḍasahitāṁ paṁcchōttarāṁ sapta
tiṁ . 3 svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1191 gunē
ṁṭti caitra kriṣṇa saptamiyu sōmavāramu
nu viṣuvusaṁkrāṁttināṁḍu śrīnarasihya
nāthadēvara sannidhi kappūravatti Akhaṁḍadīpa
mu Ācaṁdrā¨rkamu jelluṭaku Oḍādi A¨rjju
nadēvarājuluThe rest of this line is left blank in the original.
vasamunaṁ beṭṭina mōdālu ḍebbaḍēnu lekka mō
dālu 75 nuṁ goni Itaṁḍu I Akhaṁḍadīpamu
naku nela Okkaṁṭṭiki narasihyakuṁcchāna Iruvaire
ṁḍu kuṁcchālu nnaḍḍaḍu neyi pōyaṁgalāru I dī
pa vattiyaṁdduṁ beṭṭiḍi kappūramunaku
selavugā cennavrōli lāmēṭi māmiḍi sariya
lō reṁḍu vuṭlu jalakṣētramu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā
peṭṭināru . Atrastha vaiṣṇavai¨rdha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō
yamādarāt . śrīsiṁhagirināthasya padabhaktiparā
yaṇaiḥ . dha[¨r*]mmaviphnakarā yāṁti mahāpātakināṁ
gatiṁ . tasmādyatnēna dha¨rmmōyaṁ rakṣitavyō vica
kṣaṇaiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.1143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
